Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Fiksi proverb nanga tu substantifi "anu" en wan transitifi verbi "wasi"; paralleli klos nanga reciproki sensi.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Suma e yepi makandra, en yepi e kon baka; ogri ten, a kan tu sori wan sisten fu fabor nanga fabor.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Sma mus yepi makandra fu den ala kan go moro fara.
Usage Contexts: Degi taki, famiri, osowroko, politik, wroko presi, wan poku fu makandra yepi.
Register and Tone: Kolokwial; sabi-sabi; moro tru na taki fu ede nanga bun leson.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A tori de ini Afro-Surinamsi mofo-tradisi pe kolektifi wroko, makandra yepi, nanga libisma ben de furu pawa fu tan apaiti ini moeiliki ten.
First Example Sentence: Te wi ben abi fu feni moni fu a geburu oso, mi granma taki, "Wan anu wasi trawan," en ala famiri kon yepi.
Second Example Sentence: Na ofisi den seni mi go yepi a nyun man, bikasi wan anu wasi trawan e meki timi wroko bun.
Third Example Sentence: A politikaman ben e broko a taki fu wan anu wasi trawan, ma den sma ben yere wan sarki sori fu fabor nanga fabor ini en taki.

Idiom (Sranan Tongo): Wan anu no e tai matu.
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Negatif proverb nanga substantifi + negatiwe marker + aspektmaka "e" + verbi "tai" + objek "matu".
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Wan sma ensrefi no kan du ala sani; fu doro bun resulta, yu abi fu wroko nanga trawan.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Wan sma nomo no kan kba grani wroko; yu abi kolaborasi.
Usage Contexts: Skowtu, klaswroko, oso, komuniti, projekti plan, kerkisani.
Register and Tone: Kolokwial; didaktiki; bun fu gi wan srefi-tyari leson.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A meki referensi na bundru, paki, nanga agrikultur wroko pe tai wan matu ben e aksi tu anu; a de bun nanga Surinamsi kolektifi prakseri.
First Example Sentence: Te den pikin ben wani seti a presi fu a friyari, a leriman memre den taki wan anu no e tai matu.
Second Example Sentence: Mi no ben wani aksi yepi fosi, ma te a wroko kisi moro bigi, mi si taki wan anu no e tai matu.
Third Example Sentence: Na wan startup, ef ala sani de tapu wan sma nomo, dan wan anu no e tai matu tru tru.

Idiom (Sranan Tongo): Suma no yere, a musu firi.
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Proverb nanga relatifi klos; negatiwe verbi "yere" nanga modal verbi "musu" fu onavoidbare konsekwensi.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Ef wan sma no wani yere bun advaysi, a sa leri nanga en eigi skin doru pèn ofon wan tranga leson.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Sma san no e teki leson ini taki, sa leri baka na prakseri fu en eigi fowtu.
Usage Contexts: Famiritori, opvoeding, klas, mentor taki, sport, disciplini.
Register and Tone: Kolokwial; sterni; moraliserend, ma no vulgar.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A proverb de dipi ini mofo-kulturu pe gran sma e gi pikin sma leson nanga konpareti fu yere baka bifo pèn e kon.
First Example Sentence: Mi taigi en no go dringi tapu a boto te watra e hei, ma suma no yere, a musu firi.
Second Example Sentence: Den yonguman ben panya nanga moto ini regenteni, en omi taki, suma no yere, a musu firi.
Third Example Sentence: Na wroko presi te sma no e hori sekuritei-regu, suma no yere, a musu firi e tron wan srefi tru.

Idiom (Sranan Tongo): Pe doro no e opo, fensre e opo.
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Balansi proverb nanga tu paralleli klos; negatiwe + positiwe konstruksi fu kontrast.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Te wan pasi tan sroto, wan tra pasi kan opo; e gi ini tak' opo-oso, krakti, nanga adaptasi.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Ef wan okasi no waka, wan tra okasi kan kon.
Usage Contexts: Degi taki, werkloosheid, skowtu, relation, migrasi, business plan, motivasi.
Register and Tone: Kolokwial nanga inspirerendi tono; bun fu trostu.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A meki bun sensi ini stedeliki Paramaribo nanga oso-arsitekturu, pe doro nanga fensre de klari visi neti wan metafora fu alternatifi pasi ini libi.
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Sranan Tong: /pe ˈdoro no e ˈopo ˈfɛnsre e ˈopo/
First Example Sentence: Te mi no ben kisi a baan, mi anti piki mi ede nanga taki pe doro no e opo, fensre e opo.
Second Example Sentence: A pikin ben fadon ini en test, ma en pa ben memre en taki pe doro no e opo, fensre e opo.
Third Example Sentence: Na biznes, ef wan kontrakti broko, pe doro no e opo, fensre e opo kan gi yu krakti fu si nyun kansi.

Idiom (Sranan Tongo): Sabi pe yu e poti yu futu.
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Imperatif/advaysi-konstruksi nanga verbi "sabi" + lokatifi klos nanga progresifi marker "e".
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Yu musu kono yu limit, teki kibribere, en si bun pe yu de go ini wan srefi situwasi.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Yu musu waka nanga kibribere en meki desisyon nanga bun prakseri.
Usage Contexts: Famiritori, finansi, politik, internet taki, relation, straat-adisi.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A idiom e kon fu wan brederi ide fu piki yu futu ini modru, watra, of ini wan freyti presi; bun nanga wan ede fu overlibi nanga prudenti.
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Sranan Tong: /saˈbi pe ju e ˈpoti ju ˈfutu/
First Example Sentence: Yu e teki sowtu moni fu go drape-drape, ma sabi pe yu e poti yu futu, bikasi rente no e sori sari.
Second Example Sentence: Na politik, ef yu wani panya tapu en, sabi pe yu e poti yu futu fosi yu meki wan taki na radio.
Third Example Sentence: Mi lobi en ati, ma mi sabi pe mi e poti mi futu, fu no lasi misrefi ini a relation.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Imperatif idiom nanga seriali verbi "teki" + possessifi frase + verbi "luku".
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Payi bun ati, si san e psa, en no meki sani pasa yu sondro yu si en.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Yu musu luku bun en hori bun ati gi sani san de psa.
Usage Contexts: Degi taki, skowtu, oso, merkri, online sekuritei, parenti nanga pikin.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A e de wan furu produktifi mofo-konstruksi ini Sranan pe ai no de nomo fisiki, ma tu pratik-pratik fu konsentras’ en sosiali alertnes.
First Example Sentence: Te yu e waka na markt, teki yu ai luku nanga yu saki, bikasi a presi de krioyo furu.
Second Example Sentence: Leriman taki den pikin fu teki den ai luku bika a eksperimenti e go nanga faya.
Third Example Sentence: Na social media yu musu teki yu ai luku, bikasi no ala nyunsu na tru.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Elliptiki reduplikatifi frase nanga lokatifi/nominali oposisi; fiksi idiom sondro eksplisiti verbi.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Iets de kibri, no klari, of wan sma e du sani na kibri-sei; a kan tu sori dubbelemofotaki.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: A sani no de opo nanga krin; wan pisi de kibri.
Usage Contexts: Gersi, politik, famiri tori, finansi, investigasi, romans.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A bildi fu tapu nanga ondro bere e meki den taki fu wan sani san de doro na ini ma no de visi; a na wan bun model fu kibri tori ini Sranan pragmatiki.
First Example Sentence: Den taki moni no lasi, ma a buku no klop; fu mi a sani de tapu bere, ondro bere.
Second Example Sentence: A umasma e sori wan bigi lafu na fesi, ma tapu bere, ondro bere, a ben ati broko kaba.
Third Example Sentence: Na kampeni disi srefsani de tapu bere, ondro bere; den no e taki krin pe den nyun regu e kon.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Negatif proverb nanga nominali subjek "dede oso" en verbi frase "no abi" + abstrakti noun.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Na ten fu row of sori, den formalitei no de a moro prensipali sani; empati e psa fesi.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Te wan tranga sori psa, sma no e ferwacht bun serimoni of forma fu dati fosi.
Usage Contexts: Rouw, famiri, kerkisani, komuniti, literaturu, etik taki.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A e kon fu rouw-praktijk ini Suriname pe dede oso na wan sosyal presi fu kondre nanga famiri; a proverb e seti menselike meki fesi baka formalitei.
First Example Sentence: A umasma ben kon nanga slippers na berpe, ma no wan sma taki noti, bikasi dede oso no abi fes'ede.
Second Example Sentence: Te mi yere pe den no ben gi en den regelu sma-sma griti, mi piki ede nanga taki dede oso no abi fes'ede.
Third Example Sentence: Na tori-buku a skrifi ben yus' a taki dede oso no abi fes'ede fu sori pe row e broko den grense fu forma.

Idiom (Sranan Tongo): San yu saai, na en yu sa koti.
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Relatifi proverb nanga futurali marker "sa"; agrikulturali metafora nanga verbi "saai" en "koti".
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Yu aksi baka san yu du; bun of ogri aksyon e meki bun of ogri resulta.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: A konsekwensi fu yu dede e kon baka na yu srefi.
Usage Contexts: Opvoeding, religy, politik, skowtu, self-development, disciplini.
Register and Tone: Proverbiali; moraliserend; seri ma bun sabi.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A proverb abi lanti nanga agrikulturali libi nanga Bijbelse influwensi; a ben drape go ini kerk, oso, nanga dego-dego leson.
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Sranan Tong: /san ju ˈsaːi na ɛn ju sa ˈkoti/
First Example Sentence: Ef yu e seti trawan fadon fu yu win, memre taki san yu saai, na en yu sa koti.
Second Example Sentence: Den pikin ben lobi a leson bikasi a leriman ben e meki den yere taki san yu saai, na en yu sa koti.
Third Example Sentence: Na sosyali media tu a e wroko so: san yu saai, na en yu sa koti, bika yu taki e tan libi langa.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Nominali-verbali idiom nanga subjek "tori" en possessifi verbi "abi" + noun "legi".
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Wan tori no de sikin te den e drape en bakaten; a sa kisi tra meaning, gersi, of deformasi te a e psa fu wan sma go na tra sma.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Te wan tori e psa fu wan sma go na tra sma, a e kenki en no e tan eksak.
Usage Contexts: Gersi, nyunsu, politik, famiri taki, media literacy, dorpsgesprek.
Register and Tone: Kolokwial; ironiki; wan pikin waarskuwende tono.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: A idiom e meki lanti nanga mofo-kulturu pe tori ben e drai na oso-oso, strati, markt nanga werf; "legi" e gi a idea fu tori san e kisi futu fu en eigi.
First Example Sentence: No panya fu yu yere en wan pisi nomo, bikasi tori abi legi na disi kondre.
Second Example Sentence: A interview ben srefi krin, ma te den quote ben psa online, tori abi legi kaba.
Third Example Sentence: Mi granpa ben e taki fu no tyari gersi, bikasi tori abi legi en a sa kon baka nanga ogri fasi.
